questions.question: Explain the key differences between Minimax and Alpha-Beta pruning algorithms in game playing AI. (5 marks)
questions.hint: State Minimax and Alpha-Beta pruning algorithms, and describe their main differences.

questions.question: What is the purpose of tokenization in Natural Language Processing? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the process of tokenization in NLP and describe its importance.

questions.question: Describe the difference between supervised and unsupervised learning in the context of Natural Language Processing. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Compare and contrast supervised and unsupervised learning in NLP, providing examples of each.
